data.body: Foundation + first ports landed in 671be954. Done: rebar._switch (kill-switch single source of truth), ticket-append-event.sh (the one locked write seam wrapping write_commit_event, I5 preserved), rebar._commands package, and the pure single-event appends comment/set-file-impact/set-verify-commands — ported, switch-wired at dispatcher + library, dual-run green (bash AND python, byte-identical) on their 3 bash suites; new test_leaf_writes_parity.py (switch-resolution + library in-process parity); interfaces tier 224 green; default stays bash. Remaining leaf writes spawned as children: rely-suede-chase (tag/untag), peak-fawn-bug (archive), slum-visor-snail (create/edit/link/unlink/revert), bored-nape-kin (flip+soak+retire).
